_description: Workbook queue. Each entry is one real-world agent APPLICATION (a reusable target), not a framework tutorial. `harness_focus` names the harness attribute the example is built to demonstrate -- that lens, not the framework, is the lesson. Pick the next pending item by priority and scaffold it with the 4-phase commit protocol in AGENTS.md.

_field_notes.domain: the business area the use case lives in
_field_notes.harness_focus: the harness attribute this example isolates (action space, observation shaping, structured output + validation, routing, guardrails, grounding, delegation, ...)
_field_notes.framework: advisory default only -- keep examples provider/framework-agnostic (configurable model, no hardcoded vendor in code)

queue.harness_focus: action space -- reason -> call tool -> observe loop
queue.description: Hello world ReAct agent -- model loops through reason-act-observe with math tools

queue.harness_focus: schema-constrained output + validation -- urgency/category as a typed result, not free text
queue.description: Classify inbound emails by urgency and category -- first real-world structured extraction

queue.harness_focus: structured output + retry on invalid -- Pydantic schema is the contract, model retries until it validates
queue.description: Extract vendor, amount, date, and line items from invoice text using Pydantic schemas

queue.harness_focus: rubric in the prompt + grounded reasoning -- score must cite the ICP criteria it used
queue.description: Score inbound sales leads against ICP criteria and recommend next action

queue.harness_focus: classification -> conditional routing -> guarded draft reply (absorbs human-in-the-loop)
queue.description: Classify support tickets by type and urgency, route to the right team, draft first response

queue.harness_focus: scoring rubric + comparable structured output across many inputs
queue.description: Score resumes against a job spec and surface top candidates with reasoning

queue.harness_focus: long-context extraction -- pull a typed requirement list out of a large document
queue.description: Extract requirements, deadlines, and scoring criteria from procurement RFP text

queue.harness_focus: subagent delegation + handoff contracts (absorbs supervisor pattern)
queue.description: Supervisor agent coordinates a researcher sub-agent and a writer sub-agent to produce a research brief
